content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Meridian Health Systems
Customer ID: C001
Contract ID: K001
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Deal Type: New Business
Date: March 1, 2023

DEAL SUMMARY
Closed Meridian Health Systems on InsightIQ Enterprise at 30 users, $43,200 ARR. No discount applied. This was a competitive deal against DataVault Analytics, which Meridian had been evaluating in parallel for approximately six weeks.

DISCOVERY NOTES
Primary champion is Dr. Linda Forsythe, Director of Clinical Operations. Her team needed a reporting platform that could aggregate data from their three regional facilities and surface utilization trends without requiring IT involvement for each report. InsightIQ's self-serve dashboard builder was the key differentiator in the final evaluation.

CLOSING NOTES
The deal closed cleanly after a two-week proof of concept. IT sign-off came from their CISO, Raymond Park, who reviewed our SOC 2 Type II documentation and was satisfied. Legal turnaround was faster than expected — four business days.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
Meridian has two additional facilities in the planning stage. Dr. Forsythe mentioned they may need to add 10-15 users within the first year if the rollout goes well. Flag for expansion conversation at 6-month mark.
